# Metadata Test Fixtures

These files are used by metadata package tests.

## Canon_40D.jpg

Source: ianare/exif-samples

Contains:

- EXIF DateTimeOriginal
- EXIF Orientation
- Camera metadata

## Nikon_D70.jpg

Source: ianare/exif-samples

Contains:

- EXIF DateTimeOriginal
- Camera metadata

## no-exif.png

Generated by scripts/generate-test-images.sh

Contains:

- No EXIF metadata
